user_request:
I want to create a table tracking AI companies that are actively hiring.

Columns needed:
- Company Name
- Website
- Is hiring for AI roles? (yes/no)
- Team size (approximate)
- Recent funding (last round)

Find about 10 companies across different AI sectors like research, healthcare, and enterprise.
Make sure to include both established companies and startups.

columns.name: entity_id
columns.description: Unique identifier for the entity (company, research lab, etc.)
columns.validation_strategy: Assign a unique ID based on the entity's official name and domain, cross-checked with primary sources (company website, Crunchbase, official documentation).

columns.name: entity_name
columns.description: Official name of the entity as listed on primary sources
columns.validation_strategy: Verify against the entity's official website, Crunchbase, LinkedIn, or other authoritative directories.

columns.name: domain
columns.description: Primary industry or research domain of the entity (e.g., healthcare, enterprise, research)
columns.validation_strategy: Extract from the entity's 'About Us' or 'Products/Services' section on their website; cross-reference with industry directories and news articles.

columns.name: founding_year
columns.validation_strategy: Check Crunchbase, company website 'About' page, LinkedIn company profile, or press releases for founding date.

columns.name: headquarters_location
columns.description: City and country of the entity's headquarters
columns.validation_strategy: Verify on the company website's 'Contact' or 'About' page, Crunchbase, LinkedIn, or official press releases.

columns.name: team_size
columns.description: Approximate number of employees or researchers
columns.validation_strategy: Search LinkedIn company page for employee count, check 'About Us' or 'Careers' page, or find in recent news articles or Crunchbase.

columns.name: recent_funding
columns.description: Most recent funding round (amount and date, if available)
columns.validation_strategy: Search Crunchbase, TechCrunch, PitchBook, or company press releases for recent funding announcements.

columns.name: key_technologies
columns.description: Primary technologies, platforms, or research areas
columns.validation_strategy: Extract from 'Products', 'Research', or 'Technology' sections on the company website; review recent publications or news for mentions of specific technologies.

columns.name: website_url
columns.validation_strategy: Confirm via Crunchbase, LinkedIn, or direct search for the entity's official domain.

columns.name: source_last_updated
columns.description: Date when the information was last verified
columns.validation_strategy: Record the date of the most recent source (news article, Crunchbase update, website update) used to validate the row.

search_strategy.description: This table aims to catalog prominent entities (companies, research labs, institutes) actively engaged in artificial intelligence (AI) across research, healthcare, and enterprise domains. Targets must have a public presence, recent activity, and verifiable data. Focus is on entities with clear evidence of AI focus, recent funding, hiring, or research output, and avoid those with only historical or unverifiable information.

subdomains.name: AI Research Organizations
subdomains.focus: Academic labs, university-affiliated institutes, and independent research organizations with a primary focus on AI/ML research.

subdomains.name: Healthcare AI Companies
subdomains.focus: Startups and established companies applying AI to healthcare, biotech, and medical diagnostics.
search_queries: healthcare AI startups with recent funding

subdomains.name: Enterprise AI Providers
subdomains.focus: B2B companies offering AI-powered automation, analytics, and business solutions.
search_queries: AI analytics platforms for business comparison
